blocks.text: This document is encrypted with AES-128 and protected by an owner password. Anyone opening it must supply the user password (or the owner password for unrestricted access).

items: Permissions: print, copy disabled — modify, extractText denied

blocks.text: Encryption is mutually exclusive with PDF/A modes per ISO 19005. The CLI rejects --encrypt-* combined with --tagged pdfa* with exit code 2.
